stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"The game was quite creative, however rather difficult to understand initially. What made it creative was the objective of having to move to the other side on each step.","originality-rating":5,"originality-free-response":"The game was quite original; I'd never seen anything like it. What surprised me most was managing to unite all the figures at the end.","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"There were times when I didn't find the game so enjoyable, especially on level 2, because I couldn't quite understand the logic.","authenticity-rating":5,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I think the game was authentic, I'd never seen anything like it, and the effort was well spent. In life we ​​face many obstacles and we have to overcome them."}
